complaint_text:
Hello how are you

Order ID: ORD-2041

context.notes: Order found for Aina; status SHIPPED, delivery date pending. Intake had missing customer name and unknown issue type.

reasoning.rationale: Complaint contains no specific issue or complaint, only a greeting. Issue type is unknown and requires manual review to determine the customer's needs.

response.english: Hi there, we could not confidently resolve this automatically. We have escalated your case to our support team for review.
response.bahasa_malaysia: Hai, kami tidak dapat menyelesaikan isu ini secara automatik dengan yakin. Kes anda telah diserahkan kepada pasukan sokongan untuk semakan.

supervisor.supervisor_note: Customer message contained only a greeting with no specific issue. Manual review needed to clarify the customer's needs.

complaint_text: Hi, my order ORD-2041 still has not arrived after two weeks. Tracking has not moved and I would like a refund if this cannot be resolved today.

context.notes: Order found for Aina. Status: SHIPPED with no delivery date. Customer complaining of delivery delay with negative sentiment.

reasoning.rationale: Order has been shipped for two weeks with no tracking movement and no delivery date, indicating it is lost in transit. Customer explicitly requested a refund if not resolved today.

response.english: Hi Aina, we are sorry that Baju Kurung Moden - Maroon XL arrived damaged. We have approved a refund MYR 89.00 to your original payment method. Please allow a few business days for it to appear.
response.bahasa_malaysia: Hai Aina, kami mohon maaf kerana Baju Kurung Moden - Maroon XL tiba dalam keadaan rosak. Kami telah meluluskan bayaran balik MYR 89.00 ke kaedah pembayaran asal anda. Sila berikan beberapa hari bekerja untuk ia dipaparkan.

supervisor.supervisor_note: Fallback supervisor logic used because structured LLM output was unavailable.

complaint_text: Hi, my order ORD-2041 still has not arrived after two weeks. Tracking has not moved and I would like a refund if this cannot be resolved today.

context.notes: Order found for Aina. Status is SHIPPED with no delivery date. Customer reported a delivery delay with negative sentiment.

reasoning.rationale: The issue can likely be resolved by arranging a replacement or delivery follow-up.

response.english: Hi Aina, we are sorry for the issue with Baju Kurung Moden - Maroon XL. We will arrange a replacement or delivery follow-up and update you shortly.
response.bahasa_malaysia: Hai Aina, kami mohon maaf atas isu berkaitan Baju Kurung Moden - Maroon XL. Kami akan mengatur penggantian atau semakan penghantaran dan mengemas kini anda tidak lama lagi.

supervisor.supervisor_note: Approve automated reship. Elevated to high priority due to negative sentiment and missing delivery date.

context.notes: No order ID provided; order lookup returned null. Issue is damaged_item with negative sentiment.

reasoning.rationale: Customer claims damaged item and requests refund, but no order ID or customer name was provided and order lookup failed. Requires manual review to locate the order.

response.english: Hi there, we could not confidently resolve this automatically. We have escalated your case to our support team for review.
response.bahasa_malaysia: Hai, kami tidak dapat menyelesaikan isu ini secara automatik dengan yakin. Kes anda telah diserahkan kepada pasukan sokongan untuk semakan.

supervisor.supervisor_note: Order lookup failed due to missing order ID and customer name. Manual intervention required to locate order and process damaged item claim.

complaint_text: Hi, I received my order ORD-1887 but the item is damaged. The dress has a torn seam on the side. I'd like a replacement or refund please.

context.notes: Order ORD-1887 found for Hannah. Item: Linen Midi Dress - Sage M, Status: Delivered. Issue reported: damaged_item with negative sentiment.

reasoning.rationale: Item is clearly damaged (torn seam) and has been delivered; policy prefers refund for damaged delivered items.

response.english: Hi Hannah, we are truly sorry to hear that your Linen Midi Dress arrived with a torn seam. We understand how disappointing this must be. We have approved a full refund of RM 129.00 for your order ORD-1887. The refund will be processed to your original payment method shortly. Thank you for your patience, and please let us know if you need any further assistance.
response.bahasa_malaysia: Salam Hannah, kami amat minta maaf kerana Linen Midi Dress anda tiba dengan jahitan yang koyak. Kami faham betapa kecewanya situasi ini. Kami telah meluluskan bayaran balik penuh sebanyak RM 129.00 untuk pesanan ORD-1887 anda. Bayaran balik akan diproses ke kaedah pembayaran asal anda tidak lama lagi. Terima kasih atas kesabaran anda, dan sila hubungi kami jika memerlukan bantuan lanjut.

supervisor.supervisor_note: High confidence refund for damaged delivered item aligns with policy. No escalation needed.
